landing.hero_highlight: The queue handles it for you.
landing.hero_desc: Tibia Letter organizes your world's respawns into digital queues — transparent and real-time. First come, first hunt — no arguments, no letters, no favoritism.
landing.how_title: In 4 steps, you're in the queue.
landing.step1_desc: Login in seconds via Discord OAuth. No form, no registration.
landing.step2_desc: Paste a unique code in your character's Comment on tibia.com. Simple and secure.
landing.step3_desc: Each world has its own queues. Just you and the players on your server.
landing.step4_desc: Your level is validated instantly. When your turn comes, you get notified.
landing.feat1_desc: Character verified directly on tibia.com. If it's not your char, it doesn't get in the queue. Simple as that.
landing.feat2_desc: When your hunt ends, the next player is notified automatically. No one needs to babysit the spawn.
landing.feat3_desc: With Premium, join up to 3 simultaneous respawns. Maximize every minute of gameplay.
landing.sec1_title: We never ask for your password
landing.sec1_desc: Tibia Letter does not request, store, or have access to your Tibia or Tibia.com account password.
landing.sec2_desc: Character confirmation is done via a temporary code you paste in the char's public Comment field — no credentials needed.
landing.sec3_desc: We use Discord OAuth for authentication. We never create our own login forms.
landing.sec4_desc: The project is open source. Anyone can verify that no improper data collection occurs.
landing.footer_tagline: Not affiliated with CipSoft. Independent project.

demo.title: See how it works in practice.
demo.subtitle: Click the cards to expand. Simulated data — in production everything is real-time.
demo.disclaimer: 🔒 Read-only demo · Login with Discord to use for real
demo.s1_desc: Card with green border. The banner above shows your remaining hunt time.
demo.s2_desc: Another player hunting with a queue formed. Join to secure your spot.
demo.s3_desc: You are 2nd in queue. When the current hunter finishes, you get notified.
demo.s4_desc: Card pulses in gold. Accept before time runs out or lose your spot.
demo.s5_desc: Hunter just left. The spawn is reserved for 5 min before opening up.

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.desc: The page you're looking for doesn't exist or has been moved.

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.desc: You don't have permission to access this page.

characters.title: Characters
characters.no_active: No active character — link and activate one to use the queues.
characters.need_verified: You need a verified and active character to join queues.
characters.switch_modal_desc: You are waiting in <1>{{count}}</1> queue(s). Switching to <3>{{name}}</3> will automatically remove you from all of them.
characters.code_expired_msg: Code expired. Generate a new one to continue verification.
characters.confirm_remove: Remove {{name}}? This action cannot be undone.
characters.pending_code_label: Paste in the Comment field on tibia.com:

worldSelect.title: Enter Queue
worldSelect.subtitle: Select a world to see available spawn queues.
worldSelect.empty_desc: Link and verify a character to access the queues.

spawnApp.wrong_world: Your active character is from <1>{{world}}</1>. You can view queues, but cannot participate in this world.
spawnApp.no_spawns: No active spawns in this world. Be the first to start a hunt!
spawnApp.name_exists: A spawn with this name already exists in this world.
spawnApp.auto_active: You will automatically become active in this spawn.
spawnApp.wrong_world_err: Your active character is from {{world}}, not this world.
spawnApp.already_hunting: You are already hunting. Finish your current hunt before joining another queue.
spawnApp.already_in_queue: You are already in this spawn's queue.
spawnApp.free_limit: Free plan allows only 1 queue at a time. Subscribe to Premium for up to 3 queues and unlimited characters.

spawn.select_char_title: Select a character to join the queue

banner.choose_spawn_desc: Two spawns available at the same time. Accept one — the other will be passed along automatically.

verify.instructions: Go to <1>tibia.com</1>, edit character <3>{{name}}</3> and paste the code below in the <5>Comment</5> field. Then click "I've added the code".
verify.info_delay: tibia.com may take <1>up to 5 minutes</1> to reflect profile changes. If verification fails right after saving, wait a few minutes and try again.
verify.guide_step1_desc: Go to tibia.com → Account Management and click to edit the character.
verify.guide_step2_desc: Paste the code in the Comment field and save.

contact.title: Contact
contact.subtitle: Got a question, found a bug, or want to suggest something? Pick a channel below.
contact.bug_desc: Something broken? Open a GitHub issue with as much detail as possible.
contact.email_desc: General questions, suggestions, or anything else — feel free to send an email.
